title: acalypha parvula var. parvula
intro: Acalypha parvula var. parvula, also known as small copperleaf, is a perennial herb belonging to the Euphorbiaceae family. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits associated with Acalypha parvula var. parvula include its ability to treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne, as well as its use as a natural remedy for fever reduction and wound healing. Acalypha parvula var. parvula can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and its leaves can also be used topically as a poultice for skin conditions.
